# Payment Authorization

When an order is placed, we authorise the card for the order total but do not capture funds until the products ship. The authorisation hold is released by the issuing bank in under three to five business days if an order is cancelled before shipment. Split shipments capture each parcel separately, so shoppers may see several smaller charges rather than one combined charge.

[Source: payment_methods.md#payment-authorization]
